name: smartlead-skills
description: Agent skills for the Smartlead cold email outreach platform API. Covers campaigns, leads, email accounts, analytics, inbox, webhooks, clients, deliverability, prospecting, and more.
author: Smartlead Skills

skills.name: smartlead-context
skills.description: Shared context: authentication, base URL, rate limits, schemas

skills.name: campaign-management
skills.description: Create, configure, schedule, and manage outreach campaigns

skills.name: lead-management
skills.description: Add, update, pause, resume, and organize leads

skills.name: email-account-management
skills.description: Set up email accounts, warmup, and sending infrastructure

skills.name: master-inbox
skills.description: Read and respond to lead conversations

skills.name: webhook-management
skills.description: Set up event-driven webhooks for campaign automation
